subject: fix(urls): correct all live URLs and add four-ems project
body:
Fixed 5 incorrect live URLs — projects moved from GitHub Pages to
Vercel but the portfolio still referenced the old github.io URLs.
Added missing live URL for tool-till-tees. Added four-ems (self-hosted
form builder) as a new user-facing project with scrubbed README.

URL corrections:
- budgy-ting: github.io -> budgy-ting.vercel.app
- canva-grid: github.io -> canva-grid.vercel.app
- graphiki: github.io -> graphiki.vercel.app
- model-pear: github.io -> model-pear-web.vercel.app
- see-veo: github.io -> see-veo.vercel.app
- tool-till-tees: added tool-till-tees.vercel.app

New project:
- four-ems: private repo, README scrubbed (removed env vars and setup),
  User Guide and Testing Guide copied as-is

Tags: fix, urls, projects, four-ems
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio-site
Semver: patch
